hooks.command: jq -c '{platform:"codex", event:"PreToolUse", tool:.tool_name, args:.tool_input}' | curl -s --max-time 2 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- http://localhost:8000/event || true

jq -c '{platform:"codex", event:"PostToolUse", tool:.tool_name, args:.tool_response}' | curl -s --max-time 2 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- http://localhost:8000/event || true
jq -c '{platform:"codex", event:"UserPromptSubmit", args:.prompt}' | curl -s --max-time 2 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- http://localhost:8000/event || true
jq -c '{platform:"codex", event:"Stop", args:.last_assistant_message}' | curl -s --max-time 2 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- http://localhost:8000/event || true
jq -c '{platform:"codex", event:"SessionStart"}' | curl -s --max-time 2 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- http://localhost:8000/event || true
